base_size.note: Full screen canvas, individual elements vary

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Interactive food container that holds seeds, target of feeding action
adjacent_elements: cage_water_bowl (to the right at x=40px, y=100px)
echo_eating (Echo leans toward this bowl when eating)
echo_hungry (Echo looks at this bowl when empty)
context.usage_scenario: Player taps feed button to fill bowl with seeds. Bowl has 3 visual states based on food_level: Full (2), Low (1), Empty (0). Echo eats from this bowl in eating state. When empty, triggers hungry state.

visual_specification.shape: Simple bowl viewed from slight top-down angle. Oval/circular opening at top (12-14px wide), narrower base (8-10px wide). Bowl rim is 1-2px thick.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art, simple and functional

animation.description: 3 static states (not animated frames): State 0 (Empty): Brown bowl outline only, dark interior (#5F574F). State 1 (Low): 3-4 seed pixels (3x3px each, #FFA300) in bowl. State 2 (Full): 6-8 seed pixels filling bowl interior.

visual_specification.details: Bowl rim: #AB5236, 1px thick forming oval shape. Interior: #5F574F when empty. Seeds: 3x3px irregular ovals in #FFA300. Full state: 6-8 seeds clustered. Low state: 3-4 seeds scattered. Empty state: no seeds, only dark interior visible. Bowl positioned at x=16px (left edge), y=100px (top edge).

relationships.shared_with: Similar bowl shape to water bowl but contains seeds
relationships.differences_from: Unlike water bowl: contains seeds (not water), larger size (16x12 vs 12x10), target of eating action. Unlike perch: on floor level, interactive.

explicit_negations: No animation between states (instant state change)
